title: Mexican Curry Rice Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious Mexican-inspired curry rice bowl made with fluffy Japanese rice, savory curry, and a hint of buttery goodness.
instructions: Cook the fluffy Japanese rice according to package instructions.
In a large pan, melt the buttery over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the diced red bell pepper and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the curry, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the flavors have melded together.
Serve the curry over the cooked fluffy Japanese rice.
Garnish with additional buttery, if desired.
